provenance_note: Extracted from the plan-refinement-review-loop methodology, which has been run and converged repeatedly across this repo's own task history (e.g. this cited task's implementation notes record an explicit 2-iteration review: iteration 1 caught a real phase-ordering defect, iteration 2 APPROVED after the fix; the same NEEDS_REVISION->fix->APPROVED pattern recurs across many tasks under .epicd/tasks/, including BACK-600.9, BACK-605.6, BACK-605.7). This is empirical convergence evidence from repeated real use, not a dedicated docs/research/ methodology-bootstrapping write-up — see BACK-657.4's implementation notes for the full extract-vs-reference judgment call, since the shipped contract.json schema (plugin/skills/README.md) only recognizes extract/mechanical/experiment-pending and has no separate 'reference' bucket.
